summary: UX Timeline Cards improvements testing complete. All 4 targeted UX improvements verified: 1) 'Sans participant' badge displays correctly, 2) Progress bar hidden when no_active_participants=true, 3) Inactive banner shows 'Tous les participants ont décliné', 4) Counterparty shows 'Aucun participant' for declined-only RDVs. Backend unit tests: 24/24 passed. API tests: all buckets return valid data.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly computes counterparty_name='Aucun participant' when all non-org participants are inactive
participants_count and accepted_count now correctly exclude organizer (non-org only)
cancelled_participants_label correctly covers 'declined' status with label 'Tous les participants ont décliné'
no_active_participants boolean flag correctly set to true when all non-org participants are inactive
Frontend TimelineCard correctly hides progress bar when no_active_participants=true (line 495)
Frontend correctly displays 'Sans participant' badge with data-testid (line 386)
Frontend correctly displays inactive banner with data-testid (line 537)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test RDV af64f9b4-0835-42b9-a0a0-51a3b461e85d ('Test refus')
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX Timeline Cards improvements fully tested. Test RDV 'Test refus' (af64f9b4-0835-42b9-a0a0-51a3b461e85d) has 1 participant with status 'declined'. API returns: counterparty_name='Aucun participant', participants_count=1, accepted_count=0, no_active_participants=true, cancelled_participants_label='Tous les participants ont décliné'. Frontend displays: 'Sans participant' badge, inactive banner, no progress bar. 30 other cards still show progress bars correctly (no regression).
